steps_completed.task: Create useAnimationPropagation hook: manages animation state, BFS traversal, staggered timeouts, cancellation via cleanup ref
Add SVG filter definitions (<defs>) and CSS keyframe animations for evidence glow, propagation highlight, and edge flow
Increase PADDING constant from 40 to 60 to prevent glow filter clipping at viewBox edges
Wire up assumption change detection: useEffect watching assumptions, detect added/removed, identify evidence node, trigger/cancel animation
Integrate animation state into rendering: apply CSS classes to nodes, render animated propagation edges with dash-flow animation
Add probability bar coordination: highlight prop on ProbabilityBar with box-shadow transition, CSS transitions on inline SVG bars in MarketNode
